04/09/25, 8:39  - +91 78699 48584: 📢 Exciting News! 🎉

Hello Learners,
I’m glad to share that as part of the Google Student bassador Progr, I’m bringing you access to Google Gemini – Google’s latest AI model 🚀

🔹 What is Gemini?

Gemini is Google’s advanced multimodal AI – it can understand text, images, code, and even audio together.

🔹 Daily Uses for Students

📘 Study Help – summarize notes & explain tough topics
💻 Coding – debug errors & write optimized solutions
🎤 Presentations – create slides, scripts & content
🌍 Languages – get translations & practice speaking
🤖 Projects – brainstorm AI/ML & research ideas

🔹 How to try it?

1️⃣ 📱 Scan the QR below or click the link:
👉 https://aiskillshouse.com/student/qr-mediator.html?uid=5133&promptId=6

2️⃣ Wait until the page loads fully (don’t press back early).
3️⃣ Once it opens, you can try Gemini instantly!

✨ In short: Gemini is your study buddy + coding assistant + research guide – all in one! 🚀

🔹 Join the Official Group

More exciting updates, Google events, and learning resources are coming soon! Don’t miss out 👇
👉 https://chat.whatsapp.com/DbE9OGpNTgg7E4hilP7gtB?mode=ems_copy_t

✨ What can Gemini do for you?

📘 Study Smarter – Summarize notes and get clear explanations with long‑context understanding.

💻 Code Better – Generate, debug, and refactor code; even build small apps from prompts.

🎤 Create Faster – Draft slides, reports, and scripts in minutes.

🌍 Learn Languages – Translate and practice across many languages.

🤖 Innovate – Brainstorm research ideas, data workflows, and AI projects.
